context_notes: Session 2026-05-04 (continuation): Closed Phase 3 via organic-data UAT. Pushed 1f9d48fa3 to origin/main. Started /gsd-discuss-phase 4. Loaded prior context, scouted codebase, drafted 4 gray areas, asked user to multi-select which to discuss. User interrupted to invoke /gsd-pause-work. No corrective signal yet about what they want changed — possible they just needed to step away mid-flow. The 4 gray areas as drafted are reasonable; resuming agent should re-present them and check before retrying.
